item.title: Sensex Slumps Over 970 Points as Financials Drag Market Lower
item.description: The Indian equity market witnessed a sharp correction on 6 March 2026, with the Sensex plunging 979.67 points, or 1.22%, to close at 79,036.23. The Nifty followed suit, reflecting broad-based weakness amid subdued global cues and sectoral headwinds. While the broader market indices such as the S&P BSE 250 Smallcap and S&P BSE 150 Midcap indices also slipped, select pockets of strength emerged, notably in consumer goods and select small caps. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Pressure as BSE MIDCAP 150 Declines Amid Mixed Stock Performances
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, experienced a modest decline of 0.53% on 6 Mar 2026, extending a recent downtrend that has seen the index fall by 2.98% over the past five trading sessions. Despite this overall weakness, select stocks within the segment have bucked the trend, highlighting a nuanced market environment for mid-cap investors. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Downward Pressure Amid Defensive and Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a notable downturn, declining by 1.03% on the day and registering a sharper 2.83% fall over the past five trading sessions. Despite this broad weakness, select heavyweight stocks and defensive sectors have shown resilience, offering a nuanced picture of market dynamics amid ongoing volatility. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Sees Mild Correction Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has experienced a modest decline of 0.11% today, extending a recent downtrend that has seen the index fall by 2.96% over the past five trading sessions. Despite this overall softness, select stocks within the segment have delivered notable returns, underscoring a mixed performance landscape shaped by sectoral rotations and subdued market breadth. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Global Surfaces Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Shares of Global Surfaces Ltd, a player in the diversified consumer products sector, plunged to an all-time low of Rs. 75 on 6 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s extended decline. The stock’s performance continues to lag behind key benchmarks and sector indices, reflecting persistent headwinds and subdued financial metrics. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Enviro Infra Engineers Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Enviro Infra Engineers Ltd has reached an all-time low, closing just 0.39% above its 52-week low of Rs 141, reflecting a sustained period of underperformance relative to the broader market and its sector peers. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Dam Capital Advisors Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Market Pressure
item.description: Dam Capital Advisors Ltd, a key player in the Capital Markets sector, has reached a new 52-week low of Rs.138.85, marking a significant decline in its share price amid broader market pressures and company-specific performance factors. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd Hits Intraday High with 3.22% Surge on 6 March 2026
item.description: Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd (HAL) demonstrated robust intraday performance on 6 Mar 2026, surging to an intraday high of Rs 4,025, marking a 3.4% increase. This rise outpaced the Aerospace & Defense sector and the broader market, reflecting notable trading momentum despite a declining Sensex. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Stanley Lifestyles Ltd Stock Hits 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Stanley Lifestyles Ltd has reached a new 52-week low, with its stock price touching Rs.150.7 today. This marks a significant decline amid ongoing pressures in the Furniture and Home Furnishing sector, reflecting both recent quarterly results and longer-term financial trends. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Forbes Precision Tools & Machine Parts Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.119.9
item.description: Forbes Precision Tools & Machine Parts Ltd has reached a new 52-week low, with its stock price touching Rs.119.9 today. This marks a significant decline amid broader market weakness and ongoing challenges within the industrial manufacturing sector. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Sancode Technologies Ltd Hits New 52-Week High at Rs.241.7
item.description: Sancode Technologies Ltd, a player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has reached a significant milestone by hitting a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs.241.7 on 6 Mar 2026, marking a remarkable rally in its stock price amid a broader market downturn. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Ritco Logistics Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Ritco Logistics Ltd has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.193.95 today, marking a significant decline amid a sustained downtrend. The stock has underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting ongoing pressures within the transport services industry and company-specific factors. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Add-Shop E-Retail Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.6.5
item.description: Add-Shop E-Retail Ltd’s shares declined to a fresh 52-week and all-time low of Rs.6.5 today, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s downward trajectory amid persistent underperformance relative to the broader market and sector peers. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Rossari Biotech Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.466.25 Amid Continued Underperformance
item.description: Rossari Biotech Ltd’s shares declined sharply to a new 52-week low of Rs.466.25 on 6 Mar 2026, marking a significant drop amid broader market weakness and company-specific performance concerns. The stock’s fall reflects ongoing challenges in maintaining momentum within the Specialty Chemicals sector, with the share price now substantially below key moving averages and historical highs. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Universus Photo Imagings Ltd Hits New 52-Week High at Rs.479.7
item.description: Universus Photo Imagings Ltd has reached a significant milestone by hitting a new 52-week high of Rs.479.7, marking a remarkable surge in its stock price amid a challenging broader market environment. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Sprayking Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.1.49
item.description: Sprayking Ltd’s shares touched a new 52-week and all-time low of Rs.1.49 today, marking a significant decline amid persistent underperformance relative to its sector and broader market indices. The stock’s fall reflects ongoing pressures on the company’s financial metrics and market valuation. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Praxis Home Retail Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Continued Weak Performance
item.description: Praxis Home Retail Ltd has touched a new 52-week and all-time low of Rs.6.69 today, marking a significant downturn in its stock performance. The shares have been on a downward trajectory for five consecutive sessions, resulting in a cumulative loss of 14.13% over this period, underperforming its sector by 2.21% on the day. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Relicab Cable Manufacturing Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.33.1
item.description: Relicab Cable Manufacturing Ltd has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.33.1 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid broader market pressures and company-specific factors. The stock has underperformed its sector and benchmark indices, reflecting ongoing challenges in maintaining investor confidence. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: S H Kelkar & Company Ltd Stock Hits 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: S H Kelkar & Company Ltd, a key player in the specialty chemicals sector, has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.133 today, marking a significant decline amid broader market pressures and company-specific performance concerns. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Bharat Forge Ltd. Hits New 52-Week High of Rs.1936.35 on 6 Mar 2026
item.description: Bharat Forge Ltd., a leading player in the Auto Components & Equipments sector, reached a significant milestone today by hitting a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs.1936.35. This achievement underscores the stock’s strong momentum amid a broader market environment where the Sensex declined by 0.8%. Time: 24 minutes ago
